description_long: This parking meter features a tall, rectangular column with a rounded top, mounted on a wide, octagonal base for stability. The front face displays a payment interface with a white panel, which includes a display area and a black slot likely for payment insertion. The body of the meter is predominantly rust-colored, suggesting a metal construction with visible weathering and patina. The sides and rear are simpler, with a circular feature on the back that may serve as an access point or mounting cover. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on durability and function for outdoor urban environments. The meter stands at a height convenient for pedestrian interaction and is robustly built to resist tampering and environmental wear.
description: A tall, rust-colored metal parking meter with a white payment interface and a sturdy octagonal base, designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white payment interface with a display and black slot, set against a rusted metal body and wide base.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the rusted metal surface and a circular feature on the back, with no visible payment interface.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, emphasizing the payment interface and weathered appearance.
description_view_3: Side/rear view identical to view 1, showing the circular back feature and rusted surface.
attribute_payment_interface: A white rectangular payment interface is present on the front, featuring a display area and a black slot for payment. The interface appears to support coin payment, with possible buttons for interaction.
attribute_coin_slot: A black rectangular slot is present on the front, below the display, likely serving as a coin slot. It is horizontally oriented and integrated into the white panel.
attribute_digital_display: A small rectangular display area is visible on the upper part of the white panel on the front. It is integrated into the payment interface, but no specific content is visible.
attribute_mounting_post: The meter is supported by a rust-colored, rectangular metal post that extends from the octagonal base to the main body, providing stability and anchoring the meter to the ground.
